feat.name: Cautious Word
feat.requirement: You’re currently unable to cast *shield* because you used Shield Block with it.
feat.text: You let your words defend you, just as your allies in the Vellumis Scholars defend through knowledge. You immediately cast *shield* and gain its bonus to AC even though you normally couldn’t cast it, and you become slowed 1 for 1 round.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.trigger: An enemy hits you with a Strike.
